title: Support complex std::randomize patterns using args replacement strategy (#6736)
body:
This patch Implements argument replacement strategy to support `std::randomize()` with:
1. Array element arguments (e.g., `std::randomize(arr[i])` in foreach loops)
2. Mixed argument types (VarRef, MemberSel, ArraySel in same call)

Fix #6736 

Key Changes
- Replace all arguments with `__Varg*` reference parameters
- Implement `similarNode` matching for semantic equality across three types
- Prevent `__Varg*` from being re-captured by CaptureVisitor
- Add null pointer checks for robustness


Big thanks to @udayaa-init for the help!
